semanticEvent.description: Harvey Specter aggressively challenges the opposing counsel to go head-to-head immediately.
Louis Litt interjects, agreeing to the challenge but suggesting they wait for the docket.
Mike Ross addresses the court, pointing out the attorney of record on the other side.
Harvey Specter looks confused as he identifies a specific name, A. Elliot Stemple, likely the opposing lawyer.
Mike Ross feigns surprise that Harvey knows the name, playing along with the bluffs.
Mike explains his source of information, claiming Donna told him everything.
Mike finishes his sentence, emphasizing that Donna provided all the details.
A prolonged reaction shot, likely showing Harvey or the Judge processing Mike's audacious bluff.
Close-up reaction shot of a character absorbing the information.
Final shot concluding the beat, likely a lingering look between characters.
